summary: Phase 8 Backend Regression Testing Complete - All Doula and Midwife Client/Notes routes migrated from server.py to modular routers are working correctly. 40/40 tests passed.

minor.issue: Intermittent 409 conflict error on concurrent login requests (observed once, resolved on retry)

critical_code_review_comments: Doula client routes properly migrated to routes/doula.py (Lines 231-320) - GET/POST /api/doula/clients, GET/PUT /api/doula/clients/{client_id}
Doula notes routes properly migrated to routes/doula.py (Lines 322-391) - GET/POST /api/doula/notes, PUT/DELETE /api/doula/notes/{note_id}
Midwife client routes properly migrated to routes/midwife.py (Lines 217-308) - GET/POST /api/midwife/clients, GET/PUT /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}
Midwife notes routes properly migrated to routes/midwife.py (Lines 310-380) - GET/POST /api/midwife/notes, PUT/DELETE /api/midwife/notes/{note_id}
No MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors - all responses properly exclude _id field
Role-based access control verified - Doula cannot access Midwife endpoints (403), Midwife cannot access Doula endpoints (403)
CRUD operations verified: Create->Read->Update->Delete flows working for both clients and notes
Related data fetching verified - GET client by ID returns contracts, invoices, appointments/visits, and notes
seed_data_creation: Test creates TEST_ prefixed clients and notes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 backend refactoring complete. Client and Notes routes for both Doula and Midwife have been migrated from monolithic server.py to modular routers (routes/doula.py and routes/midwife.py). All endpoints verified: clients CRUD, notes CRUD, role-based access, no ObjectId serialization errors. Login uses session_token (not access_token) in response.

endpoints: GET /api/doula/clients/{client_id} - Get specific client with related data
doula_clients.note: All CRUD operations working, proper 404 for non-existent clients

endpoints: GET /api/doula/notes - List all notes (optional client_id filter)
POST /api/doula/notes - Create new note for client
doula_notes.note: Full CRUD working, validates client ownership before creating notes

endpoints: POST /api/midwife/clients - Create new client (includes lmp, gravida, para)
GET /api/midwife/clients/{client_id} - Get specific client with visits instead of appointments
midwife_clients.note: Midwife clients include additional fields: lmp, gravida, para; returns visits instead of appointments

endpoints: GET /api/midwife/notes - List all notes (optional client_id filter)
POST /api/midwife/notes - Create new note for client
midwife_notes.note: Full CRUD working, validates client ownership before creating notes

role_based_access.note: Doula cannot access /api/midwife/* endpoints (403), Midwife cannot access /api/doula/* endpoints (403)

objectid_serialization.note: All responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field - no serialization errors

mocked_apis.note: Doula and Midwife client/notes routes use real database queries
